capabilities.name: Recurring/subscription invoices
capabilities.verify: subscription-billing-cron (due manual subs → invoice) + generate_subscription_invoice skill + subscriptions.next_invoice_date/billing_interval
capabilities.notes: Verify-first 2026-06-12: engine already exists for invoice-billed (manual) subscriptions — audit 'missing' was stale. Remaining: proration (P1.1), card-provider recurring is Stripe-native.

capabilities.name: Credit/debit notes
capabilities.verify: invoices.invoice_type + credited_invoice_id + create_credit_note RPC/skill (full negates original, partial = -amount, over-credit rejected) (migration 20260614090000)
capabilities.notes: Built + scratch-Postgres verified 2026-06-14: full credit -12500, partial -5000, CN-<inv>-n numbering, over-credit + credit-a-credit-note rejected. Pending: credit-note UI + ledger reversal posting + Stage-3 before done.

capabilities.name: Partial/over/under payment handling
capabilities.verify: invoices.paid_amount_cents tracked by reconcile_invoice_payments (bank path) + record_invoice_payment RPC/skill (manual partial payments, overpay rejected, status→paid when settled) (migration 20260614100000)
capabilities.notes: Bank-rec partial/over/under already existed; added manual payment path. Scratch-Postgres verified 2026-06-14: 5000 then 7500 on a 12500 invoice → remaining 7500 then 0/status paid/paid_at set; overpay rejected. Pending: payments UI + Stage-3 before done.
